ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the participant belongs to */,
  "outcome" REAL /* Outcome measure for the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the trial */,
  "drop_out_date" TEXT /* Date if the participant dropped out of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., placebo, anxifree) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the group */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_statistics" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "mean_outcome" REAL /* Mean outcome for the group */,
  "deviation" REAL /* Deviation from the mean for each participant */,
  "squared_deviation" REAL /* Squared deviation from the mean for each participant */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the group's outcomes */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the group's outcomes */,
  "median_outcome" REAL /* Median outcome of the group */,
  "mode_outcome" REAL /* Mode outcome of the group */,
  "confidence_interval_95" TEXT /* 95% confidence interval for the group's mean outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
